calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of TWO Minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Petitioner: Jian Quing Li, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Shan Shan Li and Jing Hui Li, and with Cantonese Interpreter: William Guan.
Co-Petitioner/Mother: Qi Hong Huang, not present, but signed the Petition consenting to the name changes of the minors.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Sandy Shanshan Li and Jimmy Jinghui Li.
Decree signed in open court.
